title: Implement Central Auth Service on auth.datatoolspro.com
description:
## Phase 3: Central Auth Service

This is part of the multi-phase authentication architecture overhaul.

### Tasks
1. Set up `auth.datatoolspro.com` as a dedicated authentication service.
2. Implement tenant lookup from email domain.
3. Integrate with Stytch for authentication (handling SSO and non-SSO flows).
4. Generate and manage handoff codes for secure session transfer between auth service and application.

### Deliverables
- Central auth service deployed at auth.datatoolspro.com
- Stytch authentication integration
- Handoff code generation and validation service
acceptance_criteria: auth.datatoolspro.com service is deployed and operational
Tenant lookup from email domain resolves the correct org
Stytch integration handles SSO and non-SSO authentication flows
Handoff codes are generated securely and validated on the app side
Existing Salesforce OAuth flow continues to work
ux_changes: New centralized login flow at auth.datatoolspro.com handling SSO and non-SSO authentication.
middleware_changes: New auth service with tenant lookup, Stytch integration, and handoff code management.
data_model_changes: New tables for tenant-to-domain mapping and handoff code storage.
api_changes: New auth endpoints for tenant lookup, Stytch callback, and handoff code generation/validation.
implementation_notes: Part of epic MBT-1260. Phase 3 of the authentication architecture overhaul. Stytch is the chosen auth provider supporting both SSO and non-SSO flows.
